name: Commvault Command Center
description: Integrates with Commvault Command Center REST API for backup job management, client monitoring, subclient configuration, and recovery operations across enterprise data environments

actions.name: List Backup Jobs
actions.description: Retrieve all backup jobs with their status, completion time, and associated clients

parameters.name: jobFilter
parameters.description: Filter by job type (Backup, Restore, DataAging, AuxCopy)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by job status (Completed, Running, Failed, Waiting, Suspended)

parameters.name: completedJobLookupTime
parameters.description: Retrieve jobs completed within the last N hours

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of jobs to return

actions.name: Get Job Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific backup job including progress, errors, and performance metrics

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the backup job

actions.name: List Clients
actions.description: Retrieve all registered clients (servers, VMs, cloud resources) and their backup status

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by client status (Ready, Offline, Deconfigured)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of clients to return

actions.name: Get Client Hierarchy
actions.description: Retrieve the full client hierarchy showing subclients with available backup data for restore

actions.name: Trigger Backup
actions.description: Initiate an immediate backup job for a specified subclient

parameters.name: subclientId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the subclient to back up

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve system alerts for backup failures, capacity warnings, and operational issues

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by alert severity (Critical, Warning, Information)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return
